provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Inspectors of Explosive (Appointment) Notice

All Inspectors of Mines, the Chief Mining Engineer and the Assistant Commissioner for Mineral Resources Division are hereby appointed Inspectors of Explosives for all purposes of the Explosives Act with effect from the 29th day of August, 1969.
